nasb.text: When they had gone some distance from the house of Micah, the men who were in the houses near Micah’s house assembled and overtook the sons of Dan.

esv.text: When they had gone a distance from the home of Micah, the men who were in the houses near Micah’s house were called out, and they overtook the people of Dan.

cnv.text: 他們離開米迦的家很遠的時候，在米迦的家附近各家的人，都被召集出來，去追趕但人。

ccb.text: 他们离开米迦的家一段路后，米迦召集邻居赶了上来，
